name: Cluster
summary: A wrapping horizontal `Stack` (`direction='row'`, `wrap`, cross-axis centered) for variable-length groups that should flow onto multiple lines — tag lists, chip sets, filter pills, button bars. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`.

bestPractices: Use Cluster for collections of unknown count/width (tags, chips, buttons) so they wrap gracefully instead of overflowing or clipping.
Keep `gap` tokenized; the same gap applies between rows and within a row.
Set `wrap={false}` to opt back into a single non-wrapping row when needed.
